title: Claude Architect Certification
description: Exam-focused study path for orchestration, tool design, Claude Code configuration, prompt engineering, and reliability patterns.
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with Claude or LLM application design
Working knowledge of APIs, JSON, and tool calling
Comfort reading engineering workflows and configuration files
outcomes: Choose the right orchestration pattern for a given task shape
Design better tools, schemas, and MCP integrations
Apply Claude Code configuration precedence and deterministic hooks correctly
Guarantee structured output with the right tool choice and schema design
Manage long-running context, attribution, and recovery more reliably

lessons.title: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration
lessons.objective: Run the agent loop safely, choose the right orchestration pattern, and apply deterministic guardrails.

lessons.title: Tool Design & MCP Integration
lessons.objective: Improve tool descriptions, schema design, and failure handling for reliable tool use.

lessons.title: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows
lessons.objective: Apply configuration precedence, hooks, skills, commands, and the right working mode.

lessons.title: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output
lessons.objective: Use forced tool output, better schemas, few-shot examples, and retries to improve reliability.

lessons.title: Context Management & Reliability
lessons.objective: Preserve critical facts, handle conflicting sources, and monitor reliability at the category level.
